creator: greg.bal4@gmail.com
text:
To answer several questions:

I'm using ctwm as my window manager.  I start openscad by executing /usr/local/bin/openscad from the command line.

I have installed 13.4-RELEASE along with ports from the FreeBSD-13.4-RELEASE-amd64-memstick.img installation media.

The contents of the LIB_DEPENDS section of /usr/ports/cad/openscad/Makefile looks like this:

LIB_DEPENDS=    libzip.so:archivers/libzip \
                libhidapi.so:comms/hidapi \
                libboost_regex.so:devel/boost-libs \
                libqscintilla2_qt5.so:devel/qscintilla2-qt5 \
                libopencsg.so:graphics/opencsg \
                libgmp.so:math/gmp \
                libmpfr.so:math/mpfr \
                libfreetype.so:print/freetype2 \
                libharfbuzz.so:print/harfbuzz \
                libfontconfig.so:x11-fonts/fontconfig \
                libdouble-conversion.so:devel/double-conversion

In order for sound to work I have to add

libasound_module_pcm_oss.so:audio/alsa-plugins

to LIB_DEPENDS.

I will note that if you look at https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/cad/openscad/Makefile it appears that LIB_DEPENDS has audio/alsa-plugins in there twice.  It's not in there after installing 13.4-RELEASE.
